subcodes.first_line: Consider ye the handiwork of God and His signs, for verily they have filled the East and the West of the earth. Reflect, O people of insight [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان انظروا فی صنع الله و آیاته انها ملئت شرق الارض و غربها ان اعتبروا یا اولی
subcodes.subjects: @contemplation, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @suffering and imprisonment
